creator: ache@FreeBSD.org
text:
4) swap(a, b) macro needs to be fixed too:

#define swap(a, b)                                      \
        if (swaptype_long == 0) {                       \
                long t = *(long *)(a);                  \
                *(long *)(a) = *(long *)(b);            \
                *(long *)(b) = t;                       \
        } else if (swaptype_int == 0) {                 \
                long t = *(int *)(a);                   \
                *(int *)(a) = *(int *)(b);              \
                *(int *)(b) = t;                        \
        } else                                          \
                swapfunc(a, b, es, swaptype)
